message.content:
@startuml
participant as PicYaPaletteActivity as "PicYaPaletteActivity"
participant as ImageChooserActivity as "ImageChooserActivity"
participant as SettingsActivity as "SettingsActivity"

PicYaPaletteActivity ..> ImageChooserActivity : onCreate
ImageChooserActivity ..> SettingsActivity : startActivity
ImageChooserActivity ..> PicYaPaletteActivity : openSettings
ImageChooserActivity ..> SettingsActivity : startActivity
SettingsActivity ..> PicYaPaletteActivity : savePreferences

@enduml
